entries.source: Chat Edit: 'it works, but can you make it so that the kernel is automatically detected, not by opening `Pyshon: Select Interpreter`?'
Chat Edit: 'but it will be specific to that notebook, right? I want to make this general across all notebooks'
Chat Edit: 'Now the initial problem is back. It takes really long for detecting kernels, and I don't know it will detect eventually'
Chat Edit: 'can you make the search more explicitly?'
